title: Pizer-Errol
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Company |image=[[File:TheYellowDart.png]] |name=Pizer-Errol
Pizer-Errol's ''Stinger'' 627 S Podracer |founder= |ledby= |associations= |parent= |subsid= |headquarters= |locations= |role= |products=[[Stinger 627 S|''Stinger'' 627 S]] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]][[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] |founding= |dissolved= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|It's Slide Paramita, in his modified Pizer-Errol ''Stinger''. Very sharp.|[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fode Annodue]], a [[Troig/Legends|Troig]] race announcer, commenting on a Pizer-Errol Podracer|audio=Fode-SlideParamita.flac|}} '''Pizer-Errol''' was a company that designed [[Podracer/Legends|Podracers]], including the [[Stinger 627 S|''Stinger'' 627 S]], a Podracer notable for its maneuverability and acceleration, though it was lacking in overall speed. During [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. The racing season presented in the [[Star Wars video games|game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'' must have taken place during this year due to the appearances of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which correspond to ''The Phantom Menace''. the [[Ciasi]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Slide Paramita]] favored the Stinger and owned a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] one that he was known to modify. The vehicle was notably fragile, and could not sustain the same kind of damage larger pods could. However, that did not stop Paramita from occasionally using his ''Stinger'' as a weapon out of desperation.[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Behind the scenes== Pizer-Errol was first mentioned in the [[1999]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-episode-i-racer|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Racer - Nintendo 64 - IGN|work=[http://www.ign.com IGN]|archivedate=20161118045154}} [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'', where it acted as the manufacturer for the ''Stinger'' 627 S Podracer. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{1stm}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'' Official Nintendo Player's Guide]] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Vehicle manufacturing companies]]
